'''dahaga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycobacteraemia|mycobacteraemia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-h-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycobacteraemia|mycobacteraemia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dahaga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæhægæth|dæhægæth]] || [[word:dæhægæj|dæhægæj]] || [[word:dæhægæsh|dæhægæsh]] || [[word:dæhægæ|dæhægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dahahagath|dahahagath]] || [[word:dahahagaj|dahahagaj]] || [[word:dahahagash|dahahagash]] || [[word:dahahaga|dahahaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dahagath|dahagath]] || [[word:dahagaj|dahagaj]] || [[word:dahagash|dahagash]] || [[word:dahaga|dahaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dahafgath|dahafgath]] || [[word:dahafgaj|dahafgaj]] || [[word:dahafgash|dahafgash]] || [[word:dahafgaf|dahafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dahagatha|dahagatha]] || [[word:dahagaja|dahagaja]] || [[word:dahagasha|dahagasha]] || [[word:dahagaka|dahagaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dahagath|dahagath]] || [[word:dahagaj|dahagaj]] || [[word:dahagash|dahagash]] || [[word:dahaga|dahaga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dahagathal|dahagathal]] || [[word:dahagajal|dahagajal]] || [[word:dahagashal|dahagashal]] || [[word:dahagakal|dahagakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dahagathatha|dahagathatha]] || [[word:dahagajaja|dahagajaja]] || [[word:dahagashasha|dahagashasha]] || [[word:dahagaka|dahagaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dahagathan|dahagathan]] || [[word:dahagajan|dahagajan]] || [[word:dahagashan|dahagashan]] || [[word:dahagakan|dahagakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dahagathaoro|dahagathaoro]] || [[word:dahagajaoro|dahagajaoro]] || [[word:dahagashaoro|dahagashaoro]] || [[word:dahagakaoro|dahagakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
